title: Smell Jars
description: A grown-up-assisted smell journal where the tablet admits it cannot smell, and kids stamp real kitchen smell guesses and preferences.
learningGoals: Build smell vocabulary through real sensory experiences
Practice sniffing gently and comparing sensory clues
Affirm that smell likes and dislikes are personal
interactionModel: observe-journal tap stickers to record smell guesses, reveal reactions, and like-meter feelings
feedbackModel: Every sticker is accepted with pop and sparkle SFX plus a spoken smell note; the recap reads the smell journal back.

modes.title: Be the Nose
modes.skill: connect real smells to vocabulary and preference

credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
